payload.label: cabinet
payload.short_description: tall dark wooden cabinet, edge crop
payload.long_description: Tall, narrow dark-stained wooden cabinet with vertical paneled doors and a slimmer lighter-brown central strip; right side and part of the top are cut off by the crop (edge-cropped) and the finish shows scuffs and a slightly glossy varnish with a small chipped corner; appears to be photographed from about 2.0 m away.
